diagrams.title: Full Adder Circuit
diagrams.description: Shows internal structure of full adder using two half adders and OR gate
diagrams.purpose: Understand how full adder combines three inputs to produce sum and carry using basic gates

diagrams.title: 4-bit Ripple Carry Adder
diagrams.description: Four full adders cascaded with carry propagation chain
diagrams.purpose: Visualize how carry ripples through each stage causing propagation delay in RCA

diagrams.title: ALU Block Diagram
diagrams.description: High-level ALU architecture showing select lines, multiplexers, and data flow
elements: Status flags register (Z, C, V, N)
diagrams.purpose: Understand how ALU selects between different operations using multiplexers and control signals

diagrams.title: Carry Look-Ahead Unit
diagrams.description: Internal structure showing generate and propagate logic for fast carry computation
diagrams.purpose: Comprehend parallel carry computation concept that makes CLA faster than RCA
